name: Dynatrace (npx)
description: Connect to Dynatrace observability data: query problems, vulnerabilities, logs, metrics, traces and entities via DQL, and use Davis CoPilot AI from your AI client.

inputs.label: Dynatrace Environment URL
inputs.description: URL of your Dynatrace Platform environment (the Apps URL), e.g. https://abc12345.apps.dynatrace.com

inputs.label: Dynatrace Platform Token
inputs.description: Platform token used to authenticate to your Dynatrace environment. Recommended scopes: app-engine:apps:run, storage:buckets:read, storage:logs:read, storage:metrics:read, storage:spans:read, storage:entities:read, storage:events:read.

obtain.instructions:
1. In Dynatrace, open Account Management or your environment Settings
2. Go to Identity & access management > Platform tokens
3. Click 'Generate new token'
4. Add the required scopes (e.g. app-engine:apps:run, storage:*:read)
5. Click 'Generate token' and copy the value (starts with dt0s16.)

auth.instructions: Set DT_ENVIRONMENT to your Dynatrace Apps URL and create a Platform Token (Settings > Identity & access management > Platform tokens) with the required app-engine and storage read scopes.
